SEARCH
Package io.github.javainvaders

Class Screen

java.lang.Object
io.github.javainvaders.Screen
public class Screen extends Object
Manages all non-gameplay screens: the main menu, pause menu, level-complete screen and game-over screen. Rendering and input for thse screens live here so Main stays clean.
Author:
Larissa R. G.; Vinicius S. F.

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    Screen.MenuAction
    Actions the main menu can trigger.
    static enum

    Actions the pause menu can trigger.

    Screen.State
    All posible game states / screens.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    handleMenu(float dt, Game game)
    Handles the full main-menu frame: reads input and calls startNewGame or loadGame on the game instance depending on what the player chose.
    void
    handlePause(float dt, Game game)
    Handles the full pause frame: reads input, transitions state on Game, and draws the pause overlay on top of the frozen game.
    void
    renderGameOver(boolean won, int p1Score, int p2Score)
    Draws the game-over (or win) screen with final scores.
    void
    renderLevelComplete(int level, int[] bonusAwarded, float levelCompleteTimer)
    Draws the level-complete screen with bonus info and countdown.
    void
    renderMenu()
    Draws the main menu with title and 3 options.
    void

    Renders the pause overlay on top of the frozen game frame.

    Resets the main menu cursor to the top.

    Resets the pause cursor to "RESUME".

    Handles input on the game-over screen.

    Handles keyboard input on the main menu.

  • Constructor Details

    • Screen

      public Screen(com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.g2d.BitmapFont font, com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.g2d.BitmapFont bigFont, com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.g2d.SpriteBatch batch, com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.glutils.ShapeRenderer shapes)
      Creates the screen manager. Takes refs to the shared render resources so we dont have to create new ones.
      Parameters:
      font - regular-sized font
      bigFont - large font for headings
      batch - sprite batch for text drawing
      shapes - shape renderer for the pause overlay

  • Method Details

    • updateMenu

      public Screen.MenuAction updateMenu(float dt)
      Handles keyboard input on the main menu. Returns a MenuAction telling Main what to do next.
      Parameters:
      dt - delta time (not really used here but kept for symetry)
      Returns:
      action triggered by the player, or NONE

    • renderMenu

      public void renderMenu()
      Draws the main menu with title and 3 options.

    • handleMenu

      public void handleMenu(float dt, Game game)
      Handles the full main-menu frame: reads input and calls startNewGame or loadGame on the game instance depending on what the player chose. Also calls renderMenu so Game doesnt have to.
      Parameters:
      dt - delta time
      game - the Game instance — needed to call startNewGame / loadGame

    • updatePause

      public Screen.PauseAction updatePause(float dt)
      Handles keyboard input while paused. Returns a PauseAction so Main knows wether to resume, go to menu, or quit.
      Parameters:
      dt - delta time
      Returns:
      action chosen by the player, or NONE

    • renderPause

      public void renderPause(Runnable gameRenderCallback)
      Renders the pause overlay on top of the frozen game frame. Calls gameRenderCallback first so the background isnt black.
      Parameters:
      gameRenderCallback - a Runnable that draws the current game state

    • handlePause

      public void handlePause(float dt, Game game)
      Handles the full pause frame: reads input, transitions state on Game, and draws the pause overlay on top of the frozen game.
      Parameters:
      dt - delta time
      game - the Game instance so we can flip its currentScreen

    • renderLevelComplete

      public void renderLevelComplete(int level, int[] bonusAwarded, float levelCompleteTimer)
      Draws the level-complete screen with bonus info and countdown.
      Parameters:
      level - the level that was just cleared
      bonusAwarded - array of size 2 with bonus points for P1 and P2
      levelCompleteTimer - seconds remaining on the countdown

    • updateGameOver

      public boolean updateGameOver(float dt)
      Handles input on the game-over screen. Returns true when the player presses ENTER or ESC to go back to the main menu.
      Parameters:
      dt - delta time
      Returns:
      true if the player wants to return to the main menu

    • renderGameOver

      public void renderGameOver(boolean won, int p1Score, int p2Score)
      Draws the game-over (or win) screen with final scores.
      Parameters:
      won - true if all aliens were defeated (game beaten)
      p1Score - score for player 1
      p2Score - score for player 2

    • resetMenuSelection

      public void resetMenuSelection()
      Resets the main menu cursor to the top. Usefull when returning from a game.

    • resetPauseSelection

      public void resetPauseSelection()
      Resets the pause cursor to "RESUME". Called each time the game is paused.
